message:
feat(net): add distributed runtime, snapshot, assignment, and recovery

Closes bd-yx9r.11.2 and bd-yx9r.11 (data/messaging/distributed epic).

- Add distributed.h/distributed.c: cluster membership (node lifecycle
  with join/active/suspect/leaving/down states), consistent hash ring
  (FNV-1a, virtual nodes, binary search), partition assignment with
  round-robin rebalance, snapshot store (create/latest/restore), and
  recovery protocol (detect → restore → reassign state machine)
- 15 unit tests covering cluster, hashing, assignment, snapshots,
  and full recovery cycle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -196,7 +196,8 @@ NET_SRC := \
 	src/net/web.c \
 	src/net/grpc.c \
 	src/net/db.c \
-	src/net/messaging.c
+	src/net/messaging.c \
+	src/net/distributed.c
 
 BYTES_SRC := \
 	src/bytes/buf.c \
